Дата: 2026-04-29

title: "THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md"

  * anthropic

date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md


{quote}- [[187-слой-представительских-агентов-md]] (сходство 0.25){quote}

----





h2. THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md
markdown
{code:language=markdown}
# The Double-Triangle Architecture

<!-- similar-docs -->

---

**Похожие документы:**
- [[187-слой-представительских-агентов-md]] (сходство 0.25)
- [[166-representative-agent-layer-md]] (сходство 0.25)
- [[249-composite-skills-agent-md]] (сходство 0.14)

<!-- backlinks-auto -->
## Упоминается в

- [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]

<!-- related-auto -->
## Связанные документы

- [[249-composite-skills-agent-md|COMPOSITE SKILLS AGENT.md]] _50%_
- [[305-a-practical-path-to-layer-b-through-symbiotic-inte|A Practical Path to Layer B Through Symbiotic Integration]] _50%_
- [[304-ingit-as-cowork-native-workspace-substrate-md|INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md]] _44%_
- [[151-open-knowledge-work-foundation-md|OPEN KNOWLEDGE WORK FOUNDATION.md]] _34%_
